nodes.name: Start: Email Lead Report
nodes.description: Manually start the report of all leads with a usable email address.

nodes.name: Fetch Leads With Email
nodes.description: Read lead ID, company name, and email for every lead with a non-placeholder email value.

parameters.query: SELECT id::text AS id, company_name, BTRIM(email) AS email FROM leads WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(email) <> '' AND LOWER(BTRIM(email)) NOT IN ('n/a', 'na', 'none', 'null', 'unknown', '-') AND POSITION('@' IN BTRIM(email)) > 1 ORDER BY company_name ASC, created_at ASC

nodes.name: Build Email Lead Report
nodes.description: Create a safe Dee Empire HTML report containing lead ID, company name, and email.

nodes.name: Send Leads With Email Report
nodes.description: Send the complete lead email report to Dee Empire.

nodes.name: Done: Email Lead Report Sent
nodes.description: Return a stable summary after the internal report email is sent.

parameters.noteText:
LEADS WITH EMAIL REPORT

Purpose:
Read all leads with a usable email address and send an internal report to msesay@dee-empire.com.

Included fields:
- Lead ID
- Company name
- Email

Safety:
- Database query is read-only.
- No email is sent to leads.
- The only recipient is Dee Empire.
- Empty and placeholder email values are excluded.

Requirements:
- The leads table must exist.
- The project Email Provider must be configured.

groups.name: Phase 1 - Query Leads With Email
groups.description: Read and format all leads with usable email addresses.

groups.name: Phase 2 - Send Internal Report
groups.description: Email the report only to Dee Empire and return a summary.
